parameters.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordTypeId, StageName, Last_Stage__c, Churn_Date__c, LastModifiedDate, Account.Name, Account.Account_Owner_F__c, Account.Average_MRR__c, Account.Guesty_Admin_ID__c FROM Opportunity WHERE RecordTypeId = '0125p000001101UAAQ' AND Last_Stage__c LIKE '%declined%' AND Churn_Date__c > 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z AND LastModifiedDate >= LAST_N_DAYS:1 ORDER BY LastModifiedDate DESC

parameters.sqlQuery: =SELECT account_id, account_name, MAX(last_month_paid_listings) AS max_paid_listings FROM `guesty-data.csm.mrr_calculator` WHERE account_id = '{{ $json.Account.Guesty_Admin_ID__c }}' GROUP BY account_id, account_name LIMIT 1

googleApi.name: Google Service Account n8n-ai-cx-read - Cross Dept
